LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STEWART TITLE OF CALIFORNIA, INC.'S MOTION FOR DEPOSIT OF FUNDS WITH THE CLERK OF THE COURT, FOR DISCHARGE OF PLAINTIFF, AND FOR PAYMENT OF COSTS AND REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES FROM THE DEPOSITED FUNDS. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - THE MOTION IS GRANTED. UNDER CCP SECTION 386 (C) PLAINTIFF DID NOT NEED A COURT ORDER TO DEPOSIT THE FUNDS. THE PARTIES' PAPERS DEMONSTRATE THAT THESE ARE COMPETING DEMANDS FOR THE FUNDS. THE RELATED BANKRUPTCY CASE REQUIRED PLAINTIFF TO DO MORE THAN WOULD ORDINARILY BE REQUIRED. THE COURT AWARDS $7,000.00 TO COVER REASONABLE FEES AND COSTS OF PLAINTIFF. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MINI MINUTES:

Mark Meuser, Esq., 415-577-2850, for defendants and moving party: JEFFREY LAU AND SOPHIE LAU

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS JEFFREY LAU AND SOPHIE LAU'S Motion For Amended Order Directing Payment Of Funds Deposited. GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/CWW)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing on the Complainti in Interpleader.
Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Mark P. Meuser, Esq. appeared with defendant Sophie Lau, who was placed under oath and examined.
Mr. Meuser also appered for plaintif Jeffrey Lau, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Moshe Shatzki.
Default was entered as to defendant Depter de Vera on May 27, 2008.
Order for Deposit Funds with the Clerk of the Court, and for Discharge of plaintiff Stewart Title of California, Inc., was filed on December 9, 2008.
$43,000.00 was deposited with the Clerk of the Court on December 9, 2008.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 7, 2009.
Doe defendants dismissed today, June 21, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules that the $40,000.00 deposited with the Clerk of the Court on December 9, 2008 shall be released to defendants Jeffrey Lau and Sophie Lau, forthwith.

Counsel for defendants Jeffrey Lau and Sophie Lau shall submit a proposed judgment and/or a proposed order after hearing to the Court no later than June 24, 2010.

Notice Of Motion For Deposit Of Funs With The Clerk Of The Court, For Discharge Of Pltf And For Payment Of Costs And Reasonable Atty'S Fees From The Deposited Funds
Off Calendar Oct-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF STEWART TITLE OF CALIFORNIA, INC.'S Motion For Deposit Of Funds With The Clerk Of The Court, For Discharge Of Plaintiff, And For Payment Of Costs And Reasonable Attorney's Fees From The Deposited Funds.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - The motion is granted. Under CCP section 386 (c) plaintiff did not need a Court order to deposit the funds. The parties' papers demonstrate that these are competing demands for the funds. The related bankruptcy case required plaintiff to do more than would ordinarily be required. The Court awards $7,000.00 to cover reasonable fees and costs of plaintiff. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
